---
title: "B | Regeln Spielerisch"
format: live-html
engine: knitr
week: 8
topic: "Rechenregeln für SEM"
status: "Version 0.1"
comment: "Spiel zum Erlernen der Regeln"
lang: de
webr:
  packages: [htmltools]
  quiet: true
---

{{< include _extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}

<iframe id="mathe-game" src="static/mathe_game.html"
        style="width:100%; height:65vh; border:1px solid #333; border-radius:12px;"
        allow="fullscreen">
</iframe>

<script>
// Sync Quarto theme toggle with iframe
(function() {
  function getQuartoTheme() {
    // 1. data-bs-theme (Bootstrap 5.3+ / Quarto standard)
    var t = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-bs-theme');
    if (t === 'dark' || t === 'light') return t;
    // 2. body class .quarto-dark (some Quarto versions)
    if (document.body && document.body.classList.contains('quarto-dark')) return 'dark';
    // 3. Check for <link> with darkly theme active
    var links = document.querySelectorAll('link[rel="stylesheet"][href*="darkly"]');
    for (var i = 0; i < links.length; i++) {
      if (!links[i].disabled) return 'dark';
    }
    return 'light';
  }

  function sendTheme() {
    var theme = getQuartoTheme();
    var iframe = document.getElementById('mathe-game');
    if (iframe && iframe.contentWindow) {
      iframe.contentWindow.postMessage({ theme: theme }, '*');
    }
  }

  // Retry sending until iframe is ready (covers webR/live-html delay)
  function sendThemeWithRetry(attempts) {
    sendTheme();
    if (attempts > 0) {
      setTimeout(function() { sendThemeWithRetry(attempts - 1); }, 500);
    }
  }

  // Send on load with multiple retries
  window.addEventListener('load', function() { sendThemeWithRetry(5); });
  // Also try on DOMContentLoaded (earlier)
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    setTimeout(function() { sendThemeWithRetry(3); }, 300);
  });

  // Watch for Quarto theme changes via MutationObserver
  var observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
    mutations.forEach(function(m) {
      if (m.attributeName === 'data-bs-theme' || m.attributeName === 'class') {
        sendTheme();
      }
    });
  });
  observer.observe(document.documentElement, { attributes: true });
  // Also observe body for class changes (quarto-dark)
  if (document.body) {
    observer.observe(document.body, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['class'] });
  } else {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
      observer.observe(document.body, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['class'] });
    });
  }

  // Watch for stylesheet enable/disable changes (Quarto toggles <link> elements)
  var sheetObserver = new MutationObserver(function() { sendTheme(); });
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    document.querySelectorAll('link[rel="stylesheet"]').forEach(function(link) {
      sheetObserver.observe(link, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['disabled', 'href'] });
    });
  });
})();
</script>

Für Nebenrechungen in R:

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true


```



Notation nach:

* Steyer, R., & Eid, M. (2001). Messen und Testen (2., korrigierte Aufl). Springer.
